# Florence-2 trust_remote_code modules are incompatible with transformers 5.x
# (the custom config accesses attributes removed in the 5.x rewrite).
# Pinned to the last 4.x release that ships Florence-2 fixes.
transformers==4.49.0

torch
torchvision
accelerate
timm
einops
pillow
opencv-python
matplotlib
pandas
numpy
tqdm
pycocotools
pyyaml
